description: Events appear one-by-one across a world map with ripple animations and a timeline bar. Best for showing escalation, outbreak spread, protest waves, cyberattack campaigns across multiple locations.

fields.TITLE_TEXT: Headline, e.g. 'RANSOMWARE CAMPAIGN TIMELINE' or 'PROTEST SPREAD 2024'
fields.CONTEXT_TEXT: Summary sentence shown at end, e.g. 'Campaign hit 6 countries over 8 weeks'
